creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

  Log:
  Remove openoffice.org-2.0 and openoffice.org-2.0-devel ports.
  openoffice.org-2.0, openoffice.org-2.0-devel ports have been
  renamed to openoffice.org-2 and openoffice.org-2-devel, respectively.
